quality_assessment.notes: The description clearly states the activation method ('action') and frequency ('at will') for the inherent spellcasting ability.

mechanics_review.action_economy: Action used to activate, which is standard for item-granted at-will casting.
mechanics_review.core_effect: Grants at-will casting of *Comprehend Languages* upon activation.

llm_audit.archivist_notes: Data structure is sound and accurately reflects a standard D&D 5e item stat block. No mechanical ambiguities detected.
